parsed_review.summary:
CP00-900 is a descriptor-only RP30 People/HR Evidence (HRX-embedded) bridge pack covering RP30.P01.M01.S03-RP30.P01.M03.S02 (3 EmploymentProfile, 5 HRDocument, 2 EmploymentContract units, risk A). The pack-level claim is production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / implementation_layer=descriptor, and that claim is fully supported by the implementation.

Directly verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) packages/hrx/src/registry.js and validators.js are pure descriptor builders plus drift validators — no writeFile/appendFile, no child_process/spawn/exec, no fetch/network, no process.env reads; every runtime/write/real-data field is hard-set to false and document-body/contract-text/storage-runtime/execution-runtime/signature-runtime/document-authority-finalized are closed and asserted by validateHrxCp900HrDocumentContractBridgeDescriptor (validators.js:502-627). (2) packages/hrx/test/model.test.js asserts coverage.errors===[] and descriptor validation errors===[] for CP897-CP900 and explicitly asserts HRDocument body, contract text, and signature runtime remain closed. (3) contracts/hrx-people-contract.json matches the registry projection: latest_pack CP00-900, validation.valid true, and no_write_attestation fully closed (lines 3239-3259). (4) docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-900 entry matches the manifest plan_binding_snapshot (risk A, 10 units, range, deliverable/micro-title distributions). (5) package.json wires every validation-ladder script, and scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs plus scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs are validation-only (no writes/exec/network), confirming Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic review/evidence handling, not product runtime (hermes_packet.emits_runtime_receipt=false).

Authority boundary preserved: descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false. The pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so the human-final-approval boundary is correctly outside this receipt. Review-hardening checks pass: readiness auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1432-byte stdout, well-formed JSON success result), and claude-review-result.json records zero invalid attempts passed off as valid.

Relied on (recorded evidence, not re-executed under the read-only/no-Bash constraint): command-evidence.json shows targeted HRX validations (node --check, node --test, rp30:validate, rp30:hrx:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate) at exit 0; the full deterministic ladder (closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is documented as the closeout gate and remains pending by design (gate_outcome=pending_hardened_review_and_full_validation; commit blocked_until_review_and_full_validation). The pending state of manifest/claude-review-result/construction-inspection/adjudication is expected — they are resolved by this very review receipt and the subsequent ladder run, not defects. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, the .docx) are correctly excluded from pack scope and were not attributed to CP00-900. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on reviewer evidence scope.

findings.title: Read-only review relied on recorded command-evidence; full validation ladder executes at closeout by design
findings.details: As the read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only, no Bash), I could not execute the validation ladder myself. command-evidence.json records only the targeted HRX validations (syntax checks, node --test, rp30:validate, rp30:hrx:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate) at exit 0, with gate_outcome=pending_hardened_review_and_full_validation. The broader ladder (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is intentionally deferred to the closeout step. This is the documented sequencing (commit_policy.status=blocked_until_review_and_full_validation), not a defect. The descriptor-only implementation, tests, contract projection, plan binding, authority boundary, and no-write/no-real-data boundaries were all independently confirmed by source inspection.
findings.recommendation: At closeout, execute and record the full deterministic validation ladder green (especially npm test, npm run validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, and git diff --check) before committing, then update claude-review-result.json / construction-inspection.json / adjudication.md with this review receipt. No code change is required.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; expected gating sequence. Does not block pack or goal closeout. No unresolved P0/P1.
